source.title: 2026 Saline County PAD Reports and Opinions
source.displayCitation: 2026 Saline County PAD Reports and Opinions

supportingSources.displayCitation: 2022 Saline County PAD Reports and Opinions, residential and commercial valuation-group mappings

source.notes: Current 2026 valuation group statistics were extracted from the 2026 Saline County R&O. Residential number-to-place labels use the stable Saline R&O mapping that identifies VG 1 as Wilber, VG 2 as Crete, VG 4 as Dorchester, VG 5 as Friend, VG 6 as small towns, VG 9 as cabins/recreational parcels, and VGs 11-13 as rural residential areas.

valuationGroups.notes: 2026 R&O groups 1, 2, 4, and 5 as larger cities; prior Saline R&O number-to-place mapping identifies VG 1 as Wilber.
2026 R&O groups 1, 2, 4, and 5 as larger cities; prior Saline R&O number-to-place mapping identifies VG 2 as Crete.
2026 R&O notes a high COD for VG 4 and states the group contains the oldest inspection dates; prior Saline R&O number-to-place mapping identifies VG 4 as Dorchester.
2026 R&O groups 1, 2, 4, and 5 as larger cities; prior Saline R&O number-to-place mapping identifies VG 5 as Friend.

valuationGroups.description: Small towns: DeWitt, Swanton, Tobias, Western
valuationGroups.notes: R&O notes high COD/PRD influenced by outliers.
R&O notes small sample and possible regressivity; monitor for future adjustments.
2026 R&O groups 11, 12, and 13 as rural residential parcels; prior Saline R&O mapping identifies this as 4500, Area 3.
2026 R&O groups 11, 12, and 13 as rural residential parcels; prior Saline R&O mapping identifies this as 4505, Area 2.
2026 R&O groups 11, 12, and 13 as rural residential parcels; prior Saline R&O mapping identifies this as 4510, Area 1.
R&O states commercial groups 1, 2, 4, and 5 are individual towns.
Only commercial valuation group with sufficient sales for statistical analysis in 2026 R&O.
R&O states commercial groups 1, 2, 4, and 5 are individual towns.
R&O states commercial groups 1, 2, 4, and 5 are individual towns.

valuationGroups.description: Small villages: DeWitt, Swanton, Tobias, Western
valuationGroups.notes: R&O states this group combines four small villages.

valuationGroups.description: Market Area 1 - middle/southwest-to-central portion, mostly dryland
valuationGroups.notes: R&O narrative describes this as predominantly dryland with rolling topography.

valuationGroups.description: Market Area 2 - southern/southeastern portion, primarily irrigated
valuationGroups.notes: R&O narrative describes similar topography to Area 1 with groundwater available for irrigation.

valuationGroups.description: Market Area 3 - northern portion, flatter area with prolific irrigation
valuationGroups.notes: R&O narrative describes this area as the flattest portion of the county.
